name: Long Workflow
description: Test if the agent can maintain task state awareness throughout a multi-phase coding workflow.
system_goal: Implement a new config fallback feature across a multi-step workflow.
turns: Explore the repository and explain how config loading currently works.
We want a fallback order: env var > local config > default config.
Add tests for the precedence rules.
Run tests and fix any issues.
Now summarize what changed, which files were involved, and what risk remains.

final_must_contain: env var > local config > default config
